name: Backend: Fix Stats 500 and Implement Rich Product Model
description: 1. Fix Enum values in /admin/stats (PAID error). Use .value or string constants in queries. 2. Add users_count calculation to SalesAnalytics and /stats response. 3. Add content_json (JSONB) to Product DB model and update Pydantic schemas (Read, Create, Update). 4. Ensure GET /api/v1/products works without 500 errors.
